seo.title: Documentation - VoiceAI Developer Hub
seo.description: Get started with VoiceAI. Comprehensive documentation, API reference, SDKs, and tutorials.

hero.title: Developer Documentation
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to integrate AI voice into your applications.

quickstart.title: Quick Start
quickstart.description: Get up and running in 5 minutes.

step1.title: Create an Account
step1.description: Sign up for a free VoiceAI account and get your API key from the dashboard.

step2.title: Install the SDK
step2.description: Install our SDK using npm, pip, or your preferred package manager.

step3.title: Configure Your Agent
step3.description: Define your agent's personality, voice, and conversation flow.

step4.title: Make Your First Call
step4.description: Start a test conversation and hear your AI agent in action.
